rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENT ASSOCIATION ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petitioners Motion For Issuance Of Writ With Exhibits A And B
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 29, 2022 line 1. PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENT ASSOCIATION, SMALL PROPERTY OWNERS OF SAN FRANCISCO INSTITUTE Notice Of Petitioners Motion For Issuance Of Writ With Exhibits A And B is DENIED. Petitioner does not meet its burden of showing Section 37C.4 is invalid on its face due to preemption by state law: (1) the ordinance does not shift the burden of proof, only the burden of production; (2) state law governs the remedies available after a tenant established that a public heath order frustrates the purpose of the lease; and (3) the ordinance does not conflict with executive order N-28-20. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. DANIEL LEE DBA MOSCONE CLEANERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Equity Residential Management, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 29, 2022 line 4. Plaintiff Equity Residential Management, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment is OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service on file by the person effectuating actual personal service. The proof of service indicating that personal service was "caused" at the location that has been previously vacated by the defendant (per the motion possession surrendered on December 28, 2021) is insufficient. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. ROGER IVERSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 29, 2022 line 8. DEFENDANT ROGER IVERSON DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. The operative notice is clearly labeled as a Notice to Quit and demands delivery of possession "at the expiration of the three (3) days after service of this notice upon you." =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
